meta_title: For Students: SEO for SaaS to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SEO for SaaS and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SEO for SaaS: Build Your Portfolio as a Student Developer
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap by mastering SEO for your SaaS projects. This intermediate guide uses Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your career.
content.answer_block: To solve the 'no portfolio' problem, build a niche SaaS tool and optimize it for search intent. By integrating programmatic SEO and structured data using Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform a student project into a live, traffic-generating asset that proves your engineering expertise to top-tier employers.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank GitHub profile, knowing your code is solid but invisible. The 'no portfolio' trap is a rite of passage for students, but it’s a bottleneck that stops you from landing your first high-impact role. You don't need a viral app; you need a searchable one.

By treating your SaaS project as an SEO-first product, you shift from 'just a student' to an 'engineer who delivers growth.' We will use Antigravity to architect your site structure and Claude Code to automate the heavy lifting of technical SEO, turning your project into a magnet for recruiters.

steps.title: Define Niche Search Intent
steps.description: Identify a 'long-tail' keyword problem in your niche. You need to solve a specific pain point that people are actively searching for.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following problem space [INSERT PROBLEM] and generate 5 long-tail keyword opportunities with low competition and high transactional intent for a SaaS landing page.

steps.title: Generate Semantic Site Architecture
steps.description: Structure your app to be crawlable. Use hierarchical routing that mirrors your keyword strategy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Next.js directory structure that optimizes for the keywords generated. Include dynamic routes for landing pages and blog posts.

steps.title: Implement Schema Markup
steps.description: Inject JSON-LD structured data to help search engines understand your SaaS offering instantly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a reusable Schema.org 'SoftwareApplication' JSON-LD component for React that dynamically pulls site metadata.

steps.title: Automate Programmatic SEO Pages
steps.description: Use scripts to generate landing pages for varying user personas based on your core keywords.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script that generates static landing page content based on a template and a list of 10 target keywords.

steps.title: Optimize Core Web Vitals
steps.description: Performance is a ranking factor. Ensure your app loads under 1 second.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest code-level optimizations to improve LCP and CLS scores.

pro_tips: Target 'zero-volume' keywords; if you rank for a term with 10 searches a month, you likely own the intent for a high-value user.
Use 'Programmatic SEO' to generate pages for every variation of your tool's use case to capture long-tail traffic.
Add a 'Built by [Your Name]' footer with a link to your portfolio to turn every landing page into a resume item.
Monitor your site in Google Search Console; if you see impressions but no clicks, your meta descriptions are failing to sell the click.
Embed a 'Request a Feature' form; it improves user dwell time and gives you content ideas for future blog posts.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, submit your sitemap to Google Search Console, and begin writing one technical blog post per week based on the challenges you faced during this build.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be an engineer. Build, rank, and get hired by shipping real-world software that solves real-world problems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
